description.description: Policy description - explains what the policy checks and why it matters
examples: Checks if the system firewall is enabled to protect against unauthorized network access
Verifies full disk encryption is active on the device

query.description: osquery SQL that determines policy compliance. Required for standard policies; auto-generated when type: patch.
examples: SELECT 1 FROM system_info WHERE hostname LIKE '%-MBP-%';

type.description: Policy type. 'dynamic' (default) is a classic editable-query policy. 'patch' creates a Fleet-Maintained App patch policy whose query is auto-generated; requires fleet_maintained_app_slug.

fleet_maintained_app_slug.description: Fleet Maintained App slug for patch policies, typically in name/platform form

version.description: Pin a specific Fleet-Maintained App version for a patch policy

platform.description: Target operating system - leave empty for all platforms

calendar_events_enabled.description: Enable calendar events for this policy (fleet-only per yaml-files.md:245)

conditional_access_enabled.description: Enable conditional access for this policy

conditional_access_bypass_enabled.description: Allow conditional-access bypass for this policy (Fleet Premium). Critical policies never bypass.

webhooks_and_tickets_enabled.description: When true, this policy is added to failing_policies_webhook.policy_ids on apply (GitOps convenience). Cannot be combined with explicit policy_ids.

software_title_id.description: ID of a software title to install when this policy fails (Fleet Premium)

script_id.description: ID of a script to run when this policy fails (Fleet Premium)

team.description: Fleet (team) this policy belongs to. Renamed to 'fleet' in newer Fleet versions.

fleet.description: Fleet (team) this policy belongs to (rename target of 'team').

labels_include_any.description: Policy applies only to hosts with any of these labels (Fleet Premium)

labels_exclude_any.description: Policy excludes hosts with any of these labels (Fleet Premium)

install_software.description: Install software when this policy fails (Fleet Premium, fleet-only per yaml-files.md:245). Use boolean true for patch policies, or an object with one of: package_path, hash_sha256, app_store_id, or fleet_maintained_app_slug.

oneOf.description: Set to true on a patch policy to install the Fleet-Maintained App on policy failure
Install a specific package on policy failure

package_path.description: Path to a custom package YAML file

hash_sha256.description: SHA256 hash of a custom package

app_store_id.description: VPP App Store ID for an iOS/macOS App Store app

fleet_maintained_app_slug.description: Fleet-Maintained App slug (name/platform form, e.g. zoom/darwin)

run_script.description: Script to run when policy fails (Fleet Premium, fleet-only per yaml-files.md:245)
